author: makortel
body:
#### PR description:

This PR is part of integrating the changes from the `EVOLUTION_X` branch to the `master` branch in CMSSW_20_0_X. It removes Run 1-3 RelVal workflows that read existing non-RAW files that will not be redable in 20_0_X and onwards. Similar Phase 2 workflows are disabled by commenting them out, because they will likely be enabled in the future after their non-RAW input files have been remade.

Following the strategy agreed in ORP 2026-05-05, it is opened already now to allow it to be reviewed such that it could be merged quickly when the `master` branch moves to 20_0_X. 

**Note unusual integration:** This PR will be merged in 20_0_X regardless of the review status unless major flaws come up during the review and they have not been addressed.

Resolves https://github.com/cms-sw/framework-team/issues/2226

#### PR validation:

None beyond the tests of EVOLUTION_X IBs
title: Remove Run 1-3 and disable Phase 2 RelVal workflows that read existing non-RAW files
